summary: Video set to music with narration. It cuts between desaturated black-and-white footage of a decaying factory complex and color-graded footage of the present: Trump in silhouette under stage lights and a large American flag, and JD Vance walking through a factory rally as workers in red caps applaud. On-screen captions read 'PURSUED ENDLESS AMERICA[ LAST]', 'BUT NOW', 'HAVE THE OPPORTUNITY', 'COME FIRST'. Narration states Americans come first and workers are 'forgotten no more.' The clip ends on a black screen with the U.S. Department of Labor seal and 'LORI CHAVEZ-DEREMER.'

script.scene: Grainy black-and-white footage of an abandoned factory complex; caption 'PURSUED ENDLESS AMERICA[ LAST]'; narration describes decades of 'America last' trade deals leaving workers behind.
Backlit silhouette of Trump pointing, framed by stage spotlights and a large American flag; caption 'BUT NOW'; narration about Trump's fair trade policies.
JD Vance walking through a factory/warehouse rally as workers in red caps applaud; caption 'HAVE THE OPPORTUNITY'; narration about good-paying jobs and the American dream.
Low-angle shot of an American flag hanging in a dark industrial space lit by a single work light; caption 'COME FIRST'; narration says Americans come first.
Black screen with the U.S. Department of Labor seal and text 'LORI CHAVEZ-DEREMER'; narration says hardworking men and women are 'forgotten no more.'

notable_text: PURSUED ENDLESS AMERICA LAST; BUT NOW; HAVE THE OPPORTUNITY; COME FIRST; LORI CHAVEZ-DEREMER; FORGOTTEN NO MORE
